title: Entertainment Metrics Instance Schema v1.0.0
description: Runtime entertainment metrics instance for a single HorrorPlace VM session or segment. Uses UEC, EMD, STCI, CDL, ARR and related metrics with cross-metric constraints derived from the entertainment metrics spine.

UEC.title: User Engagement Continuity
UEC.description: Session-level measure of engagement stability. High UEC indicates sustained immersion; low UEC signals disengagement or confusion.

EMD.title: Experience Modulation Delta
EMD.description: Rate of change in player emotional valence. Positive = increasing tension/engagement; negative = release/boredom.

STCI.title: Spectral Threat Confidence Interval
STCI.description: Statistical confidence interval for perceived threat level from spectral entities. Wider intervals indicate uncertainty in threat modeling.

lower.description: Lower bound of threat confidence interval.

upper.description: Upper bound of threat confidence interval.

confidence.description: Confidence level for the interval estimate.

CDL.title: Cognitive Dissonance Level
CDL.description: Measure of narrative or mechanical contradiction experienced by the player. High CDL can enhance horror but risks confusion.

ARR.title: Adaptive Resonance Ratio
ARR.description: Ratio of player adaptation to system adaptation. ARR≈1.0 indicates synchrony; ARR≈0.0 indicates mismatch.
